summary_line: 1125-frame run, 40 player IDs, 89->40 raw-to-stitched IDs, 96.4% field registration, 0.48 ball detections/frame, 1 experiment card.

diagnostics.title: Identity stitching
diagnostics.message: Player tracker ran in hybrid_reid mode with torchvision_resnet18_imagenet@mps. Raw track IDs dropped from 89 to 40 after 49 accepted merges.
diagnostics.next_step: Inspect long same-kit occlusions and restart phases to verify the stitched IDs stay on the same players.

diagnostics.title: Tracking stability: acceptable
diagnostics.message: 40 stitched player track IDs across 1125 frames (raw 89, longest 903, mean 164.8).
diagnostics.next_step: Review the longest tracks through pans and occlusions to confirm IDs stay attached to the same players.

diagnostics.title: Team clustering: separated
diagnostics.message: 48 home tracks and 40 away tracks from 14612 jersey crops (cluster distance 0.196, mean vote ratio 0.93).
diagnostics.next_step: Cross-check goalkeepers, referees, and edge cases before treating the home and away labels as clean.

diagnostics.title: Ball detections: usable
diagnostics.message: Average ball detections per frame 0.48; projected ball anchors 493.
diagnostics.next_step: Verify that the highlighted ball follows play movement rather than bright crowd or signage artifacts.

diagnostics.title: Field calibration: active
diagnostics.message: 94/113 refreshes succeeded; mean visible pitch keypoints 6.1; 96.4% of player detections projected.
diagnostics.next_step: If the minimap drifts, inspect live preview frames for missing pitch keypoints before changing tracking settings.

diagnostics.title: Goal labels: missing
diagnostics.message: No aligned SoccerNet goal events were found for this clip.
diagnostics.next_step: Use a clip with Labels-v2.json available if you want to evaluate the example experiment against goals.
